zh.Chagford, Devons, England: 英國英格蘭戴文哈福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Cruwys於大約1362年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，她的父親John Cruwys94歲，母親Agnes Cruse84歲。她於大約1384年與John le Prouz I在英國戴文哈福德結婚。

zh-hans.Chagford, Devons, England: 英国英格兰戴文哈福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Cruwys于大约1362年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，她的父亲John Cruwys94岁，母亲Agnes Cruse84岁。她于大约1384年与John le Prouz I在英国戴文哈福德结婚。

nameMeanings.name: Cruwys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cruse
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name probably from an unidentified place in Normandy named with Old French crues, crus, creus ‘hollow’. Creuse (in Somme, Picardy) and Cruys-Straëte (formerly in Flanders, now in the French département of Nord), which have the same etymology, are alternative possibilities but seem less likely on geographical and tenurial grounds.
English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English crus(e) ‘bold, fierce’, although the regular development would be to Crowse (rhyming with house).

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Cruwys was born about 1362, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Cruwys, was 94 and her mother, Agnes Cruse, was 84. She married John le Prouz I about 1384, in Chagford, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Cruwys est née environ 1362, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Cruwys, avait 94 ans et sa mère, Agnes Cruse, avait 84 ans. Elle a épousé John le Prouz I environ 1384, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Cruwys um 1362 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Cruwys 94 und ihre Mutter Agnes Cruse 84. Sie hat um 1384 in Chagford, Devon, England John le Prouz I geheiratet.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Cruwys è nata il circa 1362 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Cruwys, aveva 94 anni e sua madre, Agnes Cruse, aveva 84 anni. Lei sposato John le Prouz I circa 1384, nel Chagford, Devon, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Cruwys(이)가 대략 1362년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cruwys(은)는 94세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Cruse(은)는 84세였다. 그녀는 대략 1384년 영국 데폰 차그퍼드에서 John le Prouz I(와)과 결혼했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Cruwys nasceu aproximadamente 1362, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Cruwys, tinha 94 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Cruse, tinha 84 anos. Ela casou-se com John le Prouz I aproximadamente 1384, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Cruwys родилась около 1362 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Cruwys было 94 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Cruse, 84. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John le Prouz I около 1384 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Cruwys nació aproximadamente 1362, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Cruwys, tenía 94 años y su mamá, Agnes Cruse, tenía 84 años. Se casó con John le Prouz I aproximadamente 1384, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra.
